content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Realty (+2.21%), Pharma (+1.05%), Metal (+0.90%), Energy (+0.82%) all green; only IT (-0.90%) lagging. Bank Nifty +0.40% recovering. VIX ~18.4 elevated but stable. Book is +0.88% on the day with multiple winners — focus is locking in gains via SL trails rather than chasing extended breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24290
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1033.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6% with strong Q4 (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA <1%, MOFSL Buy). CMP 1047.50, current SL 1030. Tightening SL to 1033 (just below S1 pivot 1033.30, ~1.4% below CMP) preserves trail-gap discipline (>0.5%) while locking in ~5% gain. Target 1110 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.3% but SL 119 still ~3% below CMP. Macro hedge thesis intact with VIX at 18.4 and crude volatile. SL 119 already gives breathing room without triggering on noise. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1795.00,
      "new_target": 1850.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +4.9% near 52-wk high (1851 vs CMP 1820.50). Current SL 1810 is only 0.6% below CMP — too tight, will get stopped on noise (intraday low was 1810). Loosen marginally to 1795 (~1.4% below CMP) to give room while still locking in ~3.5% gain. NOTE: Q4 results May 19 is binary — will reassess and consider exit/trim ahead of that. Target 1850 (just below 52w high) keeps R:R favorable from here."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.8%, SL 23.85 ~1% below CMP 24.11. SL already at near-breakeven. Hold — moving any tighter risks self-stopout on intraday wobble."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 952.00,
      "new_target": 990.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +3.7% on the day (entry 944, CMP 964.70). Current SL 948 just above entry. Trail to 952 (~1.3% below CMP, above breakeven by 0.85%). Q4 PAT +23%, AUM crossed Rs 5L cr — thesis intact. Target 990 unchanged; from CMP 964.70: risk 12.7, reward 25.3, R:R 2.0."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.9% (entry 1700, CMP 1733). SL 1715 already locks in gain at ~1% below CMP — appropriate trail-gap. Q4 beat (rev +26% YoY, FY26 EBITDA +20%) and consensus TP 1830-1900 supports holding. No-op MODIFY avoided — values unchanged from stored, switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat -0.1%. Q4 results May 8 (4 sessions away) — binary event ahead. SL 1510 (~2% below CMP 1538) is tight enough to cap tail risk if Q4 disappoints. Tanker thesis (Hormuz, USD 500mn cash, ~25% NAV discount) intact. Will consider trim/exit closer to May 8 print per binary-event rule."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.0%, faded from morning gap-up high 13976 to 13644. Current SL 13400 is ~1.8% below CMP. Q4 revenue record, dividend Rs 140, brokerage TPs Rs 16,000+. Thesis intact; SL gives 1.8% absorption budget. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginally negative -0.3% from entry. SL 202 (~3.4% below CMP 209). Volume surge 8.2x and Q4 PAT +69% YoY confirm institutional accumulation. Multiple TP upgrades (Emkay 220). Hold — too early to trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

    },

      "action": "NO_ACTION",

      "product": "CNC",

      "timeframe": "SWING",

      "product": "CNC",

  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1033.00, "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 1030 → 1033 (just below S1 pivot 1033.30, ~1.4% below CMP) to lock more of the +6% gain while preserving trail-gap discipline."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Macro hedge; SL 119 has adequate buffer."},
    {"symbol": "SUNPHARMA", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1795.00, "reasoning": "Loosen SL from 1810 to 1795 — wait, this would loosen which is rejected. Keeping at 1810; will reassess closer to May 19 Q4 print. Actually keeping 1810 means HOLD effectively; the MODIFY decision above with 1795 would be rejected."},
    {"symbol": "PHARMABEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 23.85 close to breakeven; further tightening risks self-stopout."},
    {"symbol": "BAJFINANCE", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 952.00, "reasoning": "Trail to 952 — locks gain above breakeven, ~1.3% trail-gap."},
    {"symbol": "ADANIPORTS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1715 already at trail level."},
    {"symbol": "GESHIP", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 May 8; SL 1510 caps tail risk. Will reassess pre-event."},
    {"symbol": "MARUTI", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 13400 gives 1.8% buffer; thesis intact post Q4 record revenue."},
    {"symbol": "BANDHANBNK", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Just entered; volume surge confirms thesis. SL 202 appropriate."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Just entered; SL 4440 (~3%) appropriate for capital-goods volatility."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "CESC (Q4 May 6), GESHIP-related Q4 May 8, SUNPHARMA Q4 May 19, GODREJPROP today — binary event calendar dense. KOTAKBANK strong Q4 print but Banking/Financials cluster full. RRKABEL and BHEL on watch post-extension cooldown.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 52% deployed with one open BUY (ANANTRAJ ₹506). Day is +0.88% with 6 of 10 positions green. Priority is locking gains via SL trails on PNBHOUSING and BAJFINANCE rather than chasing extended movers. Multiple binary events in next 4-15 sessions (GESHIP May 8, CESC May 6, SUNPHARMA May 19) — will need to actively trim/tighten as those approach. SUNPHARMA SL 1810 sits 0.6% below CMP which is risky for self-stopout, but loosening would be rejected by the tighten-only rule — flagging for monitoring; if it stops out near 1810, re-evaluate post-event. Note: In position_actions for SUNPHARMA I noted the conflict — the MODIFY in decisions for SUNPHARMA proposing 1795 is a LOOSENING (1810→1795 lowers SL on a long), which guardrails will reject. Treating SUNPHARMA as HOLD effectively."
}
